---
title: "overfit_corrections.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/data/overfit_corrections.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 4.67
overall_score: 4.24
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CorrectionOptimizer, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import CorrectionOptimizer and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `CorrectionOptimizer`
- `execute`
